Now Hiring – Kakinada

Medical Representative Jobs in Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma is hiring experienced Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Kakinada, East Godavari region. Promote WHO GMP certified brands across Kakinada's active pharmaceutical market — one of the most well-developed in the AP coastal belt.

📍 Kakinada & East Godavari 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 1–5 Years Experience Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Job Openings
Territory

The Kakinada Pharma Market

Kakinada is a major port city and one of the most commercially active pharma markets in the AP coastal belt. A Kakinada MR typically covers the city itself, plus sub-territories in Peddapuram, Tuni, Samalkot, Prathipadu, and Amalapuram depending on the role. The district's medical college and affiliated teaching hospitals generate strong specialist prescription volumes.

Kakinada doctors are highly receptive to quality brands and respond well to scientific detailing. Products in the gastric, cardiac, and antibiotic categories perform particularly well here due to the local population's health profile.

Key Market Areas – Kakinada

Kakinada City, Peddapuram, Tuni, Samalkot, Prathipadu, Rajanagaram, Amalapuram (East Godavari)

  • Medical college teaching hospitals driving specialist prescriptions
  • Active GP network in Kakinada city and surrounding mandals
  • Strong pharmacy distribution network throughout district
  • High antibiotic, gastric, and cardiac drug demand
  • Growing private hospital sector in Kakinada city
  • Commission-based roles available — no investment needed
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Kakinada

Medical Representative – Kakinada City
📍 Kakinada, East Godavari💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma products to GPs, specialists, and pharmacies in Kakinada
  • Build doctor relationships and generate consistent monthly prescriptions
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Regular product training and visual aid support from HQ
Commission-Based MR – Kakinada / Peddapuram
📍 Kakinada / Peddapuram / Tuni💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on Crasenim Pharma prescription generation
  • Work independently across Kakinada sub-territories (Peddapuram, Tuni, Samalkot)
  • No upfront investment — immediate start possible
  • Bonus incentives for consistent monthly target delivery
FAQs

Pharma Jobs in Kakinada – FAQ

Are there MR jobs available in Kakinada right now?
Yes. We currently have openings for full-time Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Kakinada and surrounding areas including Peddapuram, Tuni, and Samalkot.
What therapeutic areas do Crasenim Pharma MRs promote in Kakinada?
MRs in Kakinada primarily promote our antibiotic (Amoxsenim-CV 625), gastric (Pansenim-DSR), cardiac (Telsenim-40), and diabetic (Metsenim-G) products — aligned to the district's highest-demand therapeutic categories.
How do I apply for a pharma MR job in Kakinada?
WhatsApp your details to +91 99890 74806 or use the application form on our Careers page. Our team will respond within 2 working days.
